mapper.select: SELECT s.ID AS id, s.SETTING_TYPE AS settingType, s.SETTING_CONTENT AS settingContent, CASE WHEN ms.VALUE IS NULL THEN 'ON' ELSE ms.VALUE END AS VALUE, ms.VALUE AS beforeValue, s.SORT AS sort FROM SETTING s LEFT OUTER JOIN MEMBER_SETTING ms ON s.ID = ms.ID AND ms.MEMBERSHIP_NO = #{membershipNo} WHERE s.USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY s.SORT

SELECT s.SETTING_TYPE AS settingType, ms.MEMBERSHIP_NO AS membershipNo, ms.VALUE AS value FROM SETTING s INNER JOIN MEMBER_SETTING ms ON s.ID = ms.ID WHERE s.USE_YN = 'Y' AND s.SETTING_TYPE = #{settingType} AND ms.MEMBERSHIP_NO = #{membershipNo};
